source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Zoli wants to make a bench for his garden from some tree trunks sawn in half, as shown in the picture. The diameters of the two bottom trunks are 20 centimetres, and the diameter of the top trunk is 40 centimetres. What is the height of the bench in centimetres? <image1>
